phase_name: Phase BI — hermes-runtime: Grid L1 T2 Aligned Runtime

W3-governance-plugin.description: Governance Plugin — HookBridge gRPC client + monkey-patch (3 tests)
W3-governance-plugin.notes: hook proto stubs compiled, _fix_proto_imports.py for sys.path patching

W4-adapter-mapper.description: HermesAdapter + mapper — AIAgent wrapper with thread bridge (2 tests)

W5-service-16methods.description: RuntimeServiceImpl 16 方法 + telemetry + gRPC server (2 tests)

W6-docker-makefile.description: Dockerfile + Makefile targets + certifier 集成验证

key_decisions.HR-KD1: T2 Aligned（非 T1/T3）— hermes 是成熟独立 harness，薄适配零 fork
key_decisions.HR-KD2: Shared 部署模式 — hermes gateway 天然多会话复用
key_decisions.HR-KD3: Plugin + monkey-patch 混合拦截 — plugin 做遥测，monkey-patch 做 deny/modify
key_decisions.HR-KD5: gRPC EvaluateHook 单次模式 — 优先简单 RPC
key_decisions.HR-KD6: 容器基于官方 Dockerfile 叠加 — 复用 hermes 完整依赖
key_decisions.HR-KD7: _fix_proto_imports.py sys.path 修补 — 避免 proto stubs hardcoded 包路径问题

deferred: HR-D2: Hermes Skills ↔ L2 Skill Registry
HR-D3: Hermes Memory ↔ L2 Memory Engine
HR-D4: 会话状态序列化完善
HR-D6: 多平台 gateway 接入 L5
